title: Marine Collagen After 40: What It Is, What It Does, and Whether It Works
seo_title: Marine Collagen After 40: Benefits, Science, and What to Expect
meta_description: Marine collagen after 40 can support skin elasticity, hydration, and wrinkle reduction. Learn how it works, what research shows, and how to choose a quality supplement.
tags: collagen, marine collagen, skin health, women over 40, anti-aging, glow shot, beauty supplements
author: Happy Aging Team
excerpt: Collagen production drops about 1 percent per year from age 25 and accelerates sharply after 40 due to estrogen decline. Marine collagen supplements have clinical evidence behind them for improving skin elasticity, hydration, and wrinkle depth.
